attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 WI_DRR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,          
 WI_DRR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,         
 WI_DRR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,  
 WI_DRR.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY  ,
 WI_DRR.REASON_DESC_END_CUST,
 SYS_PARTY_DRR.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
 SYS_PARTY_DRR.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
 SYS_PARTY_DRR.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
 SYS_PARTY_DRR.LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
 SYS_PARTY_DRR.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
 SYS_PARTY_DRR.SALES_REP_NUM ,
 SYS_PARTY_DRR.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  ,
 SYS_PARTY_DRR.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  ,
 SYS_PARTY_DRR.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE     ,
 WI_DRR.EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
 WI_DRR.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
 WI_DRR.PROCESS_TYPE         
FROM 
 (SELECT
   BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
   BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
   BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
   DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
   ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,              
   REASON_DESC_END_CUST,
   EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
   FIN_ADJ_KEY,
   PROCESS_TYPE
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACCOUNT WHERE NA_PROCESSED_FLG='N'
  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9  ) WI_DRR
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.$$WI_DRR_SYSVIEW_PARTY SYS_PARTY_DRR
 ON WI_DRR.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY= SYS_PARTY_DRR.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY
 /*AND SYS_PARTY_DRR.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE  =WI_DRR.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE*/

SELECT
NA_SYS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 NA_SYS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 NA_SYS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 NA_SYS.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
 NA_SYS.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
 NA_SYS.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
 NA_SYS.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
 NA_SYS.LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY ,
 NA_SYS.REASON_DESC_END_CUST ,
 CASE 
 WHEN (NA_SYS.SALES_REP_NUM=NA_INCR.SALES_REP_NUM AND NA_SYS.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE=NA_INCR.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE) THEN  ENRICH_SAV1.REASON_DESCR
 WHEN  (NA_SYS.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE=NA_INCR.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE) THEN ENRICH_SAV2.REASON_DESCR
 WHEN (NA_SYS.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE=NA_INCR.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE) THEN ENRICH_SAV3.REASON_DESCR  END AS REASON_DESCR  ,
 /*ADDED THE BELOW JOIN AS PART OF APRIL QWN*/
 NA_SYS.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
 NA_SYS.SALES_REP_NUM,
NA_SYS.EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
NA_SYS.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
NA_SYS.PROCESS_TYPE
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACC_SYSPARTY NA_SYS
 INNER  JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACC_BKGS_INCR NA_INCR
 ON ( NA_SYS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY=NA_INCR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
 AND  NA_SYS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=NA_INCR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
 AND  NA_SYS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=NA_INCR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
 AND  NA_SYS.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY=NA_INCR.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY
 --AND NA_SYS.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE=NA_INCR.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
 )
 AND (
  ( NA_SYS.SALES_REP_NUM=NA_INCR.SALES_REP_NUM   AND NA_SYS.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE=NA_INCR.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE )
        OR
  (NA_SYS.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE=NA_INCR.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE ) 
       OR
  (NA_SYS.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE=NA_INCR.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE)  
   )
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ENRICH_SAV1
ON ENRICH_SAV1.BK_REASON_CD='NA_SHL6_SR'
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ENRICH_SAV2
ON ENRICH_SAV2.BK_REASON_CD='NA_SHL6'
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ENRICH_SAV3
ON ENRICH_SAV3.BK_REASON_CD='NA_SHL5'

SELECT 
 NA_SHL.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 NA_SHL.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 NA_SHL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 NA_SHL.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
 NA_SHL.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
 NA_SHL.LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,  
 NA_SHL.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
 NA_SHL.REASON_DESC_END_CUST,
 NA_SHL.REASON_DESCR,
 NA_SHL.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
 /*ADDED THE BELOW JOIN AS PART OF APRIL QWN*/
  NA_SHL.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
 NA_SHL.SALES_REP_NUM,
NA_SHL.EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
NA_SHL.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
NA_SHL.PROCESS_TYPE,
'N' AS NODE_ENRICH_FLAG,
NULL AS NODE_ENRICH_REASON
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACCOUNT_SHL NA_SHL
 WHERE (BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE) IN 
 (SELECT BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE 
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACCOUNT_SHL GROUP BY 1,2,3 HAVING ROUND(SUM(SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT))=100)

SELECT 
NABM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,          
NABM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,         
NABM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,  
NABM.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY  ,
NB.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,           
NB.SALES_REP_NUMBER    ,          
NB.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  ,
NB.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE  ,
NB.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
NABM.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
NABM.PROCESS_TYPE              
FROM
 (SELECT
   BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
   BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
   BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
   DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
   FIN_ADJ_KEY,
   PROCESS_TYPE
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRR_NAMED_ACCOUNT WHERE NA_PROCESSED_FLG='N'
  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6 )NABM
INNER JOIN  
 ( SELECT
    BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
    BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
    BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
    SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
    SALES_REP_NUMBER,
    L6_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
    L5_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE,
    ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
  FROM $$STGDB.$$WI_DRR_BOOKINGS_INCRMENTAL 
   GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8
 ) NB
ON NB.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY=NABM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND NB.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=NABM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
AND NB.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE=NABM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
